businessSummary.oneLiner: World's largest EV maker and a 'Physical AI Platform' spanning autonomous driving, robotics, energy, and AI chips
businessSummary.description: Tesla extends well beyond EV sales into FSD autonomous driving, Cybercab robotaxis, Optimus humanoid robots, and Megapack energy storage. FY2025 revenue hit $94.8B with GAAP EPS of $1.08. Q4 2025 gross margin reached 20.1%, a two-year high. FSD transitioned to a $99/month subscription model for recurring revenue. April 2026 brings Cybercab mass production and Roadster unveiling as key growth catalysts.
howTheyMakeMoney: Energy storage and generation (Megapack, Powerwall, Solar)
Services and charging (Supercharger network, insurance, OTA upgrades)

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Extreme premium vs S&P 500 avg ~23x and auto sector avg ~12x. Still elevated despite -27% from 52-week high

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on 2026E EPS of $2.08. Over 4x the growth stock avg of 30-40x. Prices in explosive robotaxi and energy growth

keyMetrics.name: Q1 2026 Delivery Consensus
keyMetrics.interpretation: Report due April 2 (Wed). +8.6% YoY vs Q1 2025 (336,681) but -13% vs Q4 2025 (418,227). Gary Black: 'Tesla has never lived up to the hype'

keyMetrics.name: 2026 Delivery Guidance
keyMetrics.interpretation: Cut from 1.75M to 1.69M. Protests and European sales weakness driving the downgrade

keyMetrics.name: WTI Oil Price
keyMetrics.interpretation: Oil breached $100 for first time since July 2022. US avg gas approaching $4/gal. Dual effect: EV demand boost vs consumer spending squeeze

keyMetrics.name: RSI (14-day)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Near oversold threshold of 30. Extreme selling pressure but pre-market +1.06% suggests possible bounce

growthDrivers.title: Oil at $100 could accelerate EV adoption
growthDrivers.description: WTI crossed $100, pushing US gas toward $4/gal. CarGurus notes $4 is the psychological tipping point where EV searches surge. Tesla holds 50%+ of the US EV market

growthDrivers.title: Tesla grabs 50%+ EV market share amid 28% industry slump (3/27)
growthDrivers.description: While total EV market dropped 28%, Tesla grew its share above 50%. Brand strength and Supercharger infrastructure become competitive advantages in downturns

growthDrivers.title: April catalyst cluster: Cybercab, Roadster, 4/21 earnings
growthDrivers.description: Cybercab mass production, Roadster unveiling, Netherlands FSD approval, and Q1 earnings (4/21) all concentrated in April

growthDrivers.title: Optimus3 robot video, summer production start (3/25)
growthDrivers.description: Tesla revealed Optimus3 gear reduction and precision hand design. Target: 1M production rate by end of 2026. Trefis values the robot business at $2-3T

growthDrivers.title: Terafab $25B AI chip factory, Wedbush calls it 'game changer'
growthDrivers.description: Wedbush reaffirmed $600 target. AI5 chip limited production starting late 2026, full ramp in 2027

growthDrivers.title: NHTSA FSD investigation escalated (3/19)
growthDrivers.description: NHTSA escalated its probe into FSD performance in low-visibility conditions. Trefis warns this could 'break the $1T AI thesis'

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 50%+ US EV market share, 8.4B miles of FSD data, NACS charging standard dominance, Terafab for AI chip insourcing

moats.description: 8.4 billion miles of real-world FSD driving data. Impossible for competitors to replicate in the near term
Supercharger network adopted as NACS standard. Ford, GM and others using Tesla charging infrastructure
Battery cells, AI chips (Terafab), software, and charging infrastructure all in-house. Cost advantage and faster innovation
Synonymous with EVs. High brand awareness and passionate fanbase generates demand without marketing spend

competitors.name: BYD
competitors.detail: China market leader, 100%+ growth in Europe. Price competitiveness advantage

competitors.name: Zoox (Amazon)
competitors.detail: Expanding robotaxi in SF, Las Vegas. Austin, Miami pilots. Direct robotaxi competitor

competitors.name: Waymo (Alphabet)
competitors.detail: Ahead of Tesla in commercial autonomous rides. 200K+ paid rides per week

competitors.name: Hyundai/Kia
competitors.detail: Expanding global EV share with Ioniq, EV6. Competing on value and quality

recentNews.headline: Gary Black: 'Tesla has never lived up to the hype' ahead of Q1 delivery report on April 2
recentNews.significance: Bull investor Gary Black warns Tesla has never met expectations. Q1 deliveries due April 2 (Wed). Consensus 365,645 units. Autoevolution notes +8.6% vs 2025's worst quarter is hardly a rebound

recentNews.headline: Oil breaches $100 as Houthi rebels fire missiles at Israel, opening new front
recentNews.significance: Houthis fired missiles at Israel, expanding the Iran war. WTI surged past $100. US gas approaching $4/gal creates dual dynamic: EV demand boost vs consumer spending squeeze

recentNews.headline: Tesla cuts 2026 delivery guidance from 1.75M to 1.69M
recentNews.significance: ARK trimmed Tesla position. Guidance cut from 1.75M to 1.69M driven by protest impact and European sales weakness

recentNews.headline: Federal regulators open probe into FSD camera-only system
recentNews.significance: NHTSA investigating FSD performance in fog, dust, and low-visibility conditions. Key risk to autonomous driving valuation

recentNews.headline: 'No Kings' protests draw millions worldwide, 200+ target Tesla
recentNews.significance: Millions joined protests worldwide. Musk's DOGE political activity made Tesla a direct protest target with 200+ anti-Tesla demonstrations

analystOpinions.notableComment: HSBC $119 vs Stifel $508, Wedbush $600. Extreme polarization continues. April 2 Q1 deliveries will set near-term direction. Gary Black: 'Never lived up to the hype'

risks.title: Q1 deliveries April 2, 'worst quarter' concerns
risks.description: Q1 delivery report due April 2 (Wed). Consensus 365,645 but Gary Black warns 'Tesla never lived up to hype.' Autoevolution notes +8.6% vs 2025's worst quarter is hardly impressive

risks.title: Oil $100 breach, Houthi entry expands war
risks.description: WTI crossed $100 as Houthis fired missiles at Israel. US gas approaching $4/gal. Potential EV demand boost offset by consumer spending squeeze and tech stock pressure

risks.title: Below both 50-day and 200-day SMAs, RSI 33 oversold
risks.description: Trading below 50-day ($387) and 200-day ($400) SMAs. RSI 33 near oversold. Pre-market +1.06% suggests possible bounce

risks.title: HSBC $119 target, ARK selling simultaneously
risks.description: Both the most famous bull (ARK) and bear (HSBC $119) turning negative. Unprecedented convergence

risks.title: FSD regulatory and safety risk escalating
risks.description: NHTSA escalated probe, camera-only system under regulatory scrutiny. Trefis warns '$1T AI thesis could break'

risks.title: Extreme valuation risk
risks.description: TTM P/E 335x, 14.5x the S&P 500 average. Delivery guidance cut makes valuation harder to justify

buyReasons.title: Oil $100 era, Tesla as biggest EV adoption beneficiary
buyReasons.rationale: US gas approaching $4/gal triggers EV search surge per CarGurus. Tesla's 50%+ EV market share positions it as the primary beneficiary

buyReasons.title: April catalyst cluster (4/2 deliveries, Cybercab, Roadster, 4/21 earnings)
buyReasons.rationale: Q1 deliveries, Cybercab production, Roadster reveal, Netherlands FSD, and earnings all in April. Potential momentum reversal

buyReasons.title: RSI 33 oversold + pre-market bounce
buyReasons.rationale: RSI near 30 oversold threshold. Pre-market +1.06% ($365.65) shows bounce potential. -27% from 52-week high

buyReasons.title: SpaceX IPO + Optimus robot as long-term catalysts
buyReasons.rationale: SpaceX IPO rumors and Optimus3 production start could justify Tesla's long-term valuation

overallOpinion: Q1 delivery report is 3 days away (April 2, Wednesday). Consensus is 365,645 units. Gary Black warns 'Tesla has never lived up to the hype,' and autoevolution says +8.6% over 2025's worst quarter is not a real rebound

Oil crossed $100 with Houthis entering the war. $4/gal gas could boost EV demand but also squeeze consumers. Delivery guidance cut to 1.69M, ARK selling. The 5x gap between HSBC $119 and Wedbush $600 shows extreme market division
Pre-market +1.06% ($365.65) suggests bounce potential. April brings Cybercab, Roadster, and 4/21 earnings. Tesla held 50%+ share in a -28% EV market. Resilience is real
$361.83, RSI 33 oversold. Below 50-day ($387) and 200-day ($400). April 2 deliveries will decide everything. Hold, wait for delivery confirmation

investmentVerdict.summary: Q1 deliveries on April 2 are the make-or-break catalyst. Consensus 365,645 units; a miss means further downside, a beat could trigger an oversold (RSI 33) bounce. Oil $100 and Houthi entry add macro risk but also EV transition catalyst. April catalysts are concentrated; waiting for delivery data is rational

sources.name: Stocktwits - Gary Black, worst quarter
sources.description: Gary Black 'never lived up to hype,' Q1 delivery consensus 365,645

sources.name: Autoevolution - Q1 rebound is an illusion
sources.description: +8.6% vs 2025's worst quarter is not a meaningful rebound

sources.name: CNBC - Houthi missiles, oil surge
sources.description: Houthi rebels fire at Israel, WTI $100+ breach

sources.name: Forbes - Iran conflict, $100 oil impact
sources.description: WTI from $67 to $100, consumer and economic impact analysis

sources.name: TipRanks - ARK selling, delivery guidance cut
sources.description: Tesla 2026 delivery outlook cut from 1.75M to 1.69M

sources.name: Simply Wall St - FSD autonomy probe
sources.description: Federal regulators probe FSD camera-only system

sources.name: InsideEVs - Tesla 50%+ share in EV slump
sources.description: Tesla gains share amid 28% EV market decline

threads.hook: TSLA: Q1 deliveries D-3. 'Never lived up to the hype' says Gary Black
threads.text:
$TSLA $361.83, pre-market +1.06%

Q1 deliveries due April 2. Consensus 365,645. Gary Black warns 'never lived up to hype.' +8.6% over 2025's worst quarter is hardly a rebound.

Oil $100, Houthi entry. Guidance cut to 1.69M. But April catalysts are loaded.

RSI 33. Hold. Wait for April 2.
